reviews.comment:
Un desastre, tenia el dinero en la app YPF y "no les andaba" pero lo mas, fue q necesitaba la regadera para agregarle agua al auto para limpiar el parabrisas y la tenia un empleado regando las matas de los alrededores, se las pido y me dicen q es la unica que tienen, es decir, tenia q esperar q el hombre charlara con el de seguridad, regara las plantas, y de mil vueltas para q se la preste a un cliente. Naahh una vergüenza. Y nadie se ofreció limpiarme los vidrios. X poco me tuve q servir yo mismo. Fui encargado de una estación de servicio y puedo decir que no se esta cumpliendo en lo más mínimo el manual de gestión, atención y o openeraciones.

(Translated by Google)
It was a disaster. I had the money in the YPF app and it "wasn't working," but the worst part was that I needed the watering can to add water to the car to clean the windshield, and an employee was using it to water the plants nearby. I asked for it, and they told me it was the only one they had. In other words, I had to wait for the man to talk to security, water the plants, and go through a lot of hoops before he'd lend it to a customer. Ugh, it was a disgrace. And nobody offered to clean my windows. I almost had to do it myself. I used to manage a gas station, and I can say that the management, customer service, and operations manual is not being followed in the slightest.
